input.tenant_message: The bathroom sink has been draining really slowly for the past few weeks. Water pools up when I'm brushing my teeth and takes like 5 minutes to go down. I tried one of those drain unclogger things from the store but it didn't really help. The shower drain seems fine. It's not an emergency but it's getting kind of annoying.

ai_output.recommended_action: Schedule a routine plumbing visit to snake or clear the bathroom sink drain — a partial clog from hair and soap buildup is the most likely cause, and this is a simple fix. The plumber should also check the P-trap for buildup while on site. No immediate action required.
